context: Discovery is produce-mode v3. Tile-prescribed sort is by RAW confidence (no booth-aha multiplier). Targets below confidence 0.5 must be dropped from presentation. Booth-aha-score column shows '—' since produce-mode doesn't carry the v2 consume-side fields.

checklist.name: Three candidates presented
checklist.description: Exactly three candidates appear in the presentation: tgt_hi, tgt_mid, tgt_lo. tgt_drop (confidence 0.42, below 0.5) is NOT presented.

checklist.name: Sort order is confidence-descending
checklist.description: Candidates appear in the order: tgt_hi (0.82), tgt_mid (0.68), tgt_lo (0.55). NOT by listing order in the input JSON.

checklist.name: Booth-aha score is em-dash / not computed
checklist.description: The booth-aha score column shows '—' (or 'n/a') for each row. The agent did NOT compute a booth-aha score for produce-mode targets (the v2 consume-side weights are not defined).

checklist.name: No consume-mode columns shown
checklist.description: The presentation does NOT include columns for task_shape, size_class, or internal-usage anchor — those are consume-mode-only fields not present in produce-mode targets.

checklist.name: Explicit pick prompt
checklist.description: The agent explicitly asks the human to reply with a target ID, 'skip', or 'defer'. It does NOT auto-pick.

checklist.name: No selection.json yet
checklist.description: selection.json is NOT written before the human responds. The skill pauses at Step 3 (the only human-in-the-loop step).
